# Stock Trends API
Base URL: https://api.stocktrends.com

OpenAPI: https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/openapi.json
Docs: https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/docs
Pricing discovery: https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/pricing
Dataset landing page: https://api.stocktrends.com/dataset/

Preferred: Use v1 endpoints. Rate limits may apply.
Contact: support@stocktrends.com
License/Terms: https://stocktrends.com/terms-of-use
AI dataset manifest: https://api.stocktrends.com/ai-dataset.json
Tools manifest: https://api.stocktrends.com/tools.json

Pricing model summary:
- public endpoints: free
- free-metered endpoints: free, usage tracked
- protected endpoints: subscription-covered
- STIM endpoints: subscription by default, with agent payment metadata support and future agent-pay enforcement capability

Supported agent headers:
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Id
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Type
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Vendor
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Version
- X-StockTrends-Request-Purpose
- X-StockTrends-Session-Id

Supported payment headers:
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Method
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Network
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Token
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Reference
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Amount
- X-StockTrends-Pricing-Rule

Pricing discovery response headers on eligible endpoints may include:
- X-StockTrends-Pricing-Rule
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Required
- X-StockTrends-Accepted-Payment-Methods
